description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Fuzz CI that runs on every pull request to the dev branch and on a scheduled cron job every Sunday at midnight. The workflow should have read permission to repository contents and use a concurrency group that cancels in-progress jobs unless the reference is master or dev. Run a fuzzing job on ubuntu-latest with a matrix strategy for address, undefined, and memory sanitizers. For each sanitizer, build fuzzers for the pcapplusplus project using google/oss-fuzz, run the fuzzers for 600 seconds, and upload artifacts if the run fails but the build succeeds.
